item.title: Positive action - Don't just talk about love, do something
item.description: Someone is taking positive actions, big or small, in response to negative things every single day even if you don't hear or see them. "Thank you" to all you positive action people. Cheers!

item.title: Images of Note: twinkerbell
item.description:
THE PUB WITCH!
(pls get me out of here)
his eyes looked so gazed over I wonder what happened to him
nyoom
It's him. It's Provolone Dave
Are you going to make Big Concrete Win?
Twinkerbell
Everything is Heresy
Looks at all the people who go "RTFM" to newbies.
Kids: Starts playing with cheap stim toys. Adults: Thus begins the fall of civilization.
Where do you fall?
The UK are passing laws to basically stop any form of protest the government or police do not like.
Now I can't unhear it.
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: Thanks mom, you're such a dick
item.description: TLDR; It's not really her fault. She was (is) bipolar. Just here to vent into the void, because getting angry at her accomplishes nothing. I was a teenager and the HPV vaccine was pretty new. I was a boarder at school. My school offered all the girls the option to get it. I chose yes. I was pretty sure I wanted to have lots of sex in my life, and as little cancer as possible. I thought about it very little. Vaccinations seemed very normal to me. I thought anyone who wasn't getting it was an idiot and a prude. Somehow, my mom found out. Maybe they needed her consent? I don't know, but she unleashed full rage on the school when she found out about it. How could they let a teenager make a decision like this?? Next thing I know, I'm not getting the HPV vaccine. I thought my mom was being crazy, but this was par for the course. So, I carried on my life. Now I'm 32, I've got HPV and not a good strain. After LEEP, the lesions came back, lots of them and very fast. Everything points to cervical cancer -- not later, or in a couple years -- NOW. So I'm getting a total hysterectomy. Now. Good thing we caught it in time. Good thing I'm married. Good thing my husband didn't really want kids. Good thing we've got enough money. I feel very grateful for a lot of things. Just super super very fucking pissed at my mom. WOULD HAVE BEEN NICE TO CHOOSE NOT HAVE KIDS RATHER THAN HAVING THE THREAT OF CERVICAL CANCER MAKE THE DECISION FOR ME. NOT TO MENTION THAT I AM UNDERGOING A DANGEROUS MEDICAL PROCEDURE. AND KICKER THAT I HAVE A PANIC ATTACK EVERY TIME I *SEE* A NEEDLE OR AN IV. In fairness, my mom was a paranoid bipolar, grieving, doing her best, which was often terrible, but what's the point of being mad at her for something she likely doesn't even remember. Also, I now understand that the media is full of terrifying sensational nonsense, which I can imagine she must find difficult to navigate since her brain tells her terrifying sensational nonsense all by itself. JUST WISH I COULD KICK HER IN THE FACE RIGHT NOW. Or shout at her, "you awful fucking cow, I am 32 and how you are STILL HURTING ME" Anyway, into the void my sad story goes. Lesson of this story kids is please vaccinate your children and vaccinate your girls for HPV. Also living with someone who has a mental illness is really hard. Silver lining, no more periods. Yay? *Most viral edit: Thank you all for your kind words and support. I'm awake after my surgery and my husband is here to take care of me.
item.dc:creator: schmitschmat

item.title: Animation in the 40s
item.description: Drawing animations in the 1940s was an arduous process which took sometimes close to a hundred artists thousands of hours to create. This was a for a few reasons, the first is that animations such as Popeye were detailed enough that making the entire picture over again for a 10 second clip could take an individual artist tens of hours.

item.description:
greetings online friends
hip young principal
good times
don’t look
everyone hates on self checkout but I like it
looks cool, but I don’t think I had these
mmm hmm
relatable
perhaps
does anyone actually see 'paint store'?
if it’s licorice, no thanks
dang
depends on the type of ceiling lamp I guess
the event of a lifetime
canister- like in The Rock
this pretzel crazy
I didn’t censor that
that’s my time, have a great night gang!!

item.title: Does a bear dump in the woods? - 079
item.description:
Febearary
The royal family must love baking, because they are really inbread.
Big if true.
Beep boop, time to poop.
Always was.
What do Socrates and my pants have in common? They're both pissed.
Mm, paste...
That's why I made the big brain decision to achieve nothing.
Correct.
It is only a true aircraft carrier if it cost the taxpayers billions of dollars.
my last two braincells be like
Hopin' for a pokin'.
Bear fact #370: There are at least 14 bears. 077 - https://imgur.com/gallery/8TZHL3C 076 - https://imgur.com/gallery/7u7vR7t 075 - https://imgur.com/gallery/0easqW9 074 - https://imgur.com/gallery/gaFapOO 073 - item.dc:creator: Ngugi

item.title: Wholesome GIF dump to improve your Thursday :)
item.description:
1. 30+ years ago on Saturday Night Live: Macaulay and Kieran Culkin together on screen
2. Farmer makes smile with his cows
3
4. In Japan everyone takes care of children
5. They are so adorable
6. Dad level maxed out at: 100
7. Asian super hero just revealed his identity
9. Wow! Just Scotland being Scotland!
10. Me trying to go to gym on a Sunday
11
12. "Gimme a moment, I can explain!"
13. Snuggles tax
14. And finally I would like to share with you that I've been pursuing a dream of mine - to complete and publish a game. It's a "Stanley Parable" inspired game and I'm doing my best to make it as best as I can. (The demo made it to Steam's top 10 new demos). It would mean the world to me if you supported me with a wishlist: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ And please, don't waste your life away, not doing what you love! Start today, right now if you have to! P.S. I have been getting a lot of feedback that people do not like the voice I was using for the Narrator, so I got a new voice actor that does a great job! Please check out the new version of the demo!
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Looking for the best order of panel for best result
item.description: Hello Grylock here I m finishing this strip, but I'm unsure about the best panel order. This is the original layout. But i m thinking 3-4-2-1 Or 2-1-3-4 Works as well. Edit: Hey Thanks for the front page :) The final version will come later this week I still wanted to animate one of the panels. A first for me. For more of my comics, the best place is still Instagram. https://www.instagram.com/gryzlock_comics Cheers
item.dc:creator: gryzlock

item.description: Source: https://apnews.com/article/oregon-republican-walkout-reelection-f1d270db9e9a72935c13b973d79a4bb7 Alternate: https://www.oregonlive.com/politics/2024/02/republican-senators-who-walked-out-of-oregon-legislature-cant-seek-reelection-state-supreme-court-rules.html Fox puppets laying out how to steal an election before actively commanding it: https://imgur.com/gallery/sQzDOlI Pardons for criminals, by criminals: https://www.justice.gov/pardon/pardons-granted-president-donald-j-trump-2017-2021 Brought to you by: "The best people" https://imgur.com/gallery/5k3JHlE https://imgur.com/gallery/9zDDKFT (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/LPyUdYF (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/7wxyNys (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/taJZoC7 (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/VdkqbFS (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/YlAGDFN (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/8GHlxoG (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/8VGDY8w (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/hYduSMS (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/3uhtTUq (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/JJzITny (continued) FULL LIST: https://www.dailykos.com/history/user/CajsaLilliehook Don't forget Gweggy! https://imgur.com/gallery/ddZqpFD More from Texas: https://imgur.com/gallery/NNRExX2 Also in Texas: https://imgur.com/gallery/prqm2cq Also in Texas (update provided by: UnknownParticipant67): https://www.chron.com/neighborhood/moco/news/article/texas-right-to-life-luke-bowen-prison-solicit-teen-17788511.php That's a lot of lawsuits! https://www.azcentral.com/pages/interactives/trump-lawsuits/ Indictment 3: https://imgur.com/gallery/JQ99Kxu Follow the progress of indictment 3 against the terrorist! https://www.courtlistener.com/docket/67656604/united-states-v-trump/ Indictment 4: https://imgur.com/gallery/Kq3qYbO
